articles.title: Piyush Patel on Europe’s role in global battery supply chains
articles.author: Oliver Branston with Piyush Patel
articles.summary: A discussion of Europe’s battery supply chain options, from joint ventures and midstream diversification to distressed asset acquisition and the future of sodium-ion technologies.

articles.title: Benjamin Collie on Gas in Britain’s Power Transition
articles.author: Oliver Branston with Benjamin Collie
articles.summary: An overview of gas’s changing role in Britain’s electricity system, and how gas plant operators may adapt through flexibility, hydrogen, CCUS and new commercial models.

articles.title: Meera Kotak on unlocking opportunities and addressing challenges for modular reactors
articles.author: Oliver Branston with Meera Kotak
articles.summary: A look at how modular reactors could move nuclear from one-off megaprojects to repeatable product models, and what must happen on fuel, licensing and supply chains to make that possible.

articles.title: Asif Sheikh on the case for CCUS
articles.author: Oliver Branston with Asif Sheikh
articles.summary: An explanation of why CCUS is technologically ready but still economically difficult, and how different policy playbooks are trying to create viable markets.

articles.title: Declan O’Donahue on the changing role of energy system operators
articles.author: Oliver Branston with Declan O’Donahue
articles.summary: A guide to GB’s evolving system operator model, the grid connection backlog, and the importance of better data, flexibility and process reform.

articles.title: Samuel Pachoud on market-led vs planned energy systems
articles.author: Oliver Branston with Samuel Pachoud
articles.summary: A comparison of market-led and planned energy systems, drawing lessons from Britain, the US, Australia, France and China on how to deliver faster clean power build-out.

articles.title: Alwyn Hopkins on the EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM)
articles.author: Oliver Branston with Alwyn Hopkins
articles.summary: A practical explanation of CBAM, from carbon leakage and reporting rules to importer strategy, embedded emissions and geopolitical implications.

articles.title: Anthony Byrne on agentic AI for grid operators
articles.author: Oliver Branston with Anthony Byrne
articles.summary: A case for agent-driven workflows in grid operations, focused on governed data layers, operational productivity, resilience and the barriers of data, people and cyber risk.

articles.title: Environmental Effect of Crypto
articles.author: Oliver Branston
articles.summary: An archive thought piece exploring whether cryptocurrency’s energy use has been overstated and whether mining could, under some conditions, support renewable energy growth.

articles.title: A New Age of Greenwashing in the Car Industry Thought Piece
articles.author: Oliver Branston
articles.summary: An archive piece on electric vehicles, asking whether they are as sustainable as they appear once manufacturing, mining, electricity production and recycling are all considered.

articles.title: UN Gender Bond Thought Piece
articles.author: Oliver Branston
articles.summary: An archive article examining sovereign gender bonds, microfinance and the limits of sustainable finance as a tool for delivering meaningful change for women.
